channel.title: Self Help on 108Mhz
channel.description: Recent content in Self Help on 108Mhz

item.title: Study Less Study Smart
item.description: Marty Lobdell - Study Less Study Smart In brief: 30 min study sessions with 5 min breaks no music except certain study music special desk/ room for studying/working learn concepts before facts (be able to explain things in your own words) take notes teach another person use mnemonics for textbooks: – feel free to move to different chapters- it’s not a novel – for each chapter: see images, main points and questions
